about.bio.1: My curiosity drives everything — from designing AI-native financial products that earn user trust, to architecting systems that scale without losing craft. I'm wired to find the gap between what exists and what's possible, then close it at startup speed.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it's where design strategy meets technical fluency and business outcomes that I do my best work — and I'm told it shows.
about.quote.text: Great design starts with deep empathy, moves through systems thinking, and ends with measurable impact.
about.title: Lead designer. 0→1 builder. AI-native practitioner.
about.value.0.desc: Every product starts with a genuine problem worth solving — I don't draw a frame until I understand the behavior I'm designing for.
about.value.0.title: Hypothesis-first
about.value.1.desc: The smallest missed interaction detail creates the biggest drop in conversion, trust, and retention.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Working directly with founders and cross-functional partners is how design becomes strategy — not decoration.
about.value.2.title: Founder-level collaborator
about.value.3.desc: Design decisions connect to business outcomes. If I can't measure it, I design until I can.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of adoption, insights generated by the platform directly informed targeted marketing campaigns and customer engagement strategies that reversed a negative profit trajectory. The business moved from a –17% margin to a +2% margin, improved customer retention and subscription renewals, increased average cart size, and reduced friction for entrepreneurs onboarding new customers — demonstrating how thoughtfully applied generative AI can drive measurable commercial outcomes when grounded in meaningful design and research principles.

modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in customer retention and subscription renewals driven by real, actionable behavioral insights.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average cart size and customer lifetime value through AI-native personalization.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced consumer acquisition friction and onboarding — proactively addressing needs before they became drop-off moments.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled organizational awareness of customers, empowering ~40 users across sales, customer service, field development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: A 0→1 AI-native persona platform built on live business intelligence data. Combines structured behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights — enabling teams to understand not just who customers are, but how and why they make decisions. Designed and shipped end-to-end in 4 months using Claude AI, Gemini API, and custom LLM workflows.

modal.project.1.challenge: I architected and led delivery of a comprehensive token-driven design system to modernize a fragmented web and portal experience spanning marketing, sales, consumer-facing reports, and internal communications tools. The goal was not only visual renewal, but a durable system improving consistency, scalability, and execution speed — aligning design decisions with business outcomes and consumer needs.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in time to deliver
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More design deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer hours saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Consistent design patterns across all consumer-facing products — eliminating inconsistencies between designers and teams.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: A shared source of truth in Figma referenced directly in CMS — clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations for every artifact.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between UX strategy and business goals by embedding consumer intent directly into system standards.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of junior and mid-level designers through clear, repeatable token-driven patterns.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Gained executive trust by providing visible, consistent standards referenced across deliverables org-wide.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in Contentful — enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a shared source of truth. Adoption materially improved delivery speed, design quality, and team confidence — transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic capability at startup speed.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This system changed how we work. Delivery time was cut by roughly 50%. Visual and interaction quality jumped by about 80%. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every project.

modal.project.1.title: Design System Architect
modal.project.2.challenge: I've defined the experience strategy and design for a new consumer membership join flow and entrepreneurial advancement system. The core challenge is twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing members to join in compliance with company requirements, and ensuring prospective members clearly understand the value of both the products and the business opportunity — without confusion, friction, or mistrust.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn ↓
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified consumer value proposition — reducing hesitation and confusion at tier selection.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in cart and checkout through clearer expectations and guided success states.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led activation as a first-class consumer experience rather than an optional afterthought.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for members advancing toward entrepreneurial participation and business sharing.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable join and advancement framework aligned with long-term retention and consumer growth.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes membership as a guided progression rather than a transactional gate — aligning interaction design, social platforms, and subscription mechanics across landing pages, cart, and checkout. The experience encourages first-time visitors to join with a product subscription and confidently move toward sharing the business. The result is a scalable foundation that improves conversion, reduces abandonment at critical consumer moments, and supports sustainable growth.

modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the membership journey and aligning it with subscription-based product engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at join, and improved confidence — an update that can potentially support both revenue and long-term success.

modal.project.2.title: Membership Join Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end refactoring of cart and checkout for a high-growth consumer platform facing critical revenue leakage from extreme abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining consumer trust and checkout flows that diverged significantly from modern fintech and retail standards positioned this as a business recovery effort — not a visual refresh.

modal.project.4.kpi.1.label: Less Abandonment
modal.project.4.kpi.2.label: Trust in Experience

modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven consumer cart experience addressing uncertainty at the point of purchase.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced cognitive load in checkout flows by eliminating unnecessary steps and ambiguity.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled subscriptions as a first-class action directly within the consumer cart.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern consumer fintech and retail UX standards — closing the gap with top-performing competitors.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Growth in revenue, retention, and trust metrics through isolated, measurable UI improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring consumer trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the cart — including subscriptions, upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, PMO, and engineering to establish a design-led roadmap that aligns interaction decisions with business outcomes at startup speed.

modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and design for a new sitewide intelligent search component to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing consumers to rely on external search engines to find products — directly undermining conversion and member confidence.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: Smart Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore consumer trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results in the most visible positions.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce consumer effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through intelligent product recommendations and upsell logic.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single, coherent AI-native experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic consumer tool and growth lever supporting subscriptions, membership, and retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core consumer experience layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer, the new system delivers exact, high-confidence results, guides users when intent is unclear, and surfaces recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and membership actions.

modal.project.5.quote.text: By rebuilding search around relevance and intent rather than keywords alone, we potentially reduce friction at the earliest stage of the consumer journey.
